title: Croton toliarensis
intro: Croton toliarensis is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Croton toliarensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, Croton toliarensis is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and it is also used in the production of herbal teas and supplements.
